name: CloudTrail KMS Encryption Enabled
description: CloudTrail trails should have KMS encryption enabled using an AWS KMS key for additional security of log files stored in S3
remediation: Enable KMS encryption for CloudTrail by specifying a KMS key ID in the trail configuration. Use aws cloudtrail update-trail --name <trail-name> --kms-key-id <kms-key-arn>
remediation_steps: Navigate to CloudTrail in the AWS Console
Select the trail that needs encryption
Click 'Edit' and scroll to 'Log file SSE-KMS encryption'
Enable the option and select or create a KMS key
